title: Add e-ink display node to T-Echo DTS/overlay and enable SPI2
description: Add child node under &spi2 for GDEW0154M10 using appropriate compatible (uc81xx or gooddisplay), set gpios for DC/RESET/BUSY/EN, update chosen zephyr,display. Enable in puck overlay and conf with CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_DISPLAY=y. Follow board conventions from t_deck.
close_reason: DTS/overlay/conf updated, west build succeeded for t_echo with display enabled, test vectors match expected init. Conventional commit done.
